query: Standard M6 bolt dimensions including head diameter and thread pitch
research_plan:
SUB-QUESTIONS:
1. What is the standard coarse thread pitch for an M6 bolt?
2. What is the specific "Width Across Flats" (wrench size) for a standard ISO 4017 / DIN 933 M6 hex bolt?
3. What is the standard head height (k) and maximum head diameter (e) for an M6 hex bolt?

SEARCH QUERIES:
- "M6 metric bolt standard coarse thread pitch ISO 261"
- "DIN 931 DIN 933 M6 hex bolt dimensions table"
- "ISO 4014 M6 bolt head geometry width across flats"
- "Metric external thread dimensions M6x1.0 specifications"

BEST WEBSITES TO CHECK DIRECTLY:
- https://www.engineeringtoolbox.com/
- https://www.mcmaster.com/
- https://www.accu.co.uk/

DONE WHEN:
- Confirmed thread pitch (expected 1.0mm).
- Confirmed head width (expected 10mm) and height (expected 4mm) from 2-3 independent engineering tables or supplier catalogs.
- Distinction made between standard hex head and socket cap dimensions if data is ambiguous.
